---
title: "F. Incident + Response"
subtitle: "DR playbook (IR-8), SLA escalation, runbooks, break-glass, active-passive replication"
doc-type: subcategory-landing
pillar: compliance
sub-category: F
status: scaffold
date: 2026-04-24
aspirational: true
---

# F. Incident + Response {.unnumbered}

When something breaks or drifts, the response is deterministic. DR
playbooks, SLA escalation paths, break-glass procedures, and Git replica
failover are all pre-authored, versioned, and testable.

## Leaves

- **F.1** Disaster Recovery Playbook (IR-8 aligned)
- **F.2** SLA Escalation Playbooks (MOD_Q)
- **F.3** Incident runbooks
- **F.4** Break-glass procedures
- **F.5** Active-passive Git replication

::: {.callout-note title="Ready to port"}
Posted DR Playbook (9,249 words) and Operations Runbook (6,224 words)
are v1.0-ready. Promotion to this sub-category is a Phase 4 authoring
pass — see [migration plan §6](../../../planning/customer-documents-taxonomy.md).
:::
